device_name: uCT ATLAS Astound with uWS-CT-Dual Energy Analysis; uCT ATLAS with uWS-CT-Dual Energy Analysis
intended_use: uCT ATLAS Astound is a computed tomography x-ray system, which is intended to produce cross-sectional images of the whole body by computer reconstruction of x-ray transmission data taken at different
intended_use_full: uCT ATLAS Astound is a computed tomography x-ray system, which is intended to produce cross-sectional images of the whole body by computer reconstruction of x-ray transmission data taken at different angles and planes. uCT ATLAS Astound is applicable to head, whole body, cardiac, and vascular x-ray Computed Tomography. uCT ATLAS Astound is intended to be used for low dose CT lung cancer screening for the early detection of lung nodules that may represent cancer.
target_condition: Lung cancer screening (lung nodule detection); cardiac and vascular imaging; general body imaging
ground_truth: For CardioXphase: annotated heart and coronary artery structures. For reader studies: comparison against predicate methods (KARL 3D for CardioBoost, FBP for AIIR, standard EFOV for Ultra EFOV).
other_metrics: CardioBoost: improved LCD, noise reduction, spatial resolution compared to FBP. AIIR: improved LCD, noise reduction, spatial resolution compared to FBP. CardioXphase: DICE Similarity Coefficient, Precision, Recall metrics reported for heart and coronary artery structure extraction (all indicators met verification criteria). Motion Freeze: reduced head motion artifacts. Ultra EFOV: improved CT number accuracy. CardioCapture: diagnostic coronaries >50% of segments achieved. Reader studies: 5-point scale evaluations showing equal or better image quality across multiple aspects.

recalls.reason: Third-party outer covers can become trapped between patient table and gantry, causing mechanical interference during table movement.
